hooks.command: if [ -f AGENTS.md ]; then if [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"},"systemMessage":"Follow the repo startup order from AGENTS.md and notes/reference before opening raw code.
